violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (mushrooms) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Init taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation.PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
(Food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (kitchen ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep unit ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The (walls ) in the (basement ) area is in poor repair.Observed holes exposing concrete and wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (various foo product) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives and knife holder) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC moved to warewashing area to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

(Various food product ) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
(Food product) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
Dumpster area observed with refrigerators and empty propane containers. Refuse areas must be kept cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024
The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
